# ANALYSIS: Real-fills validation for current engine on 2025 non-J-anchor sample (N≥20)

**Filed:** 2026-05-24
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** analysis
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We need to validate the real-fills performance of the current engine (without any new candidate) on a 2025 non-J-anchor sample of at least 20 trades to ensure that the engine's performance in simulation matches real OPRA fills before J review can proceed.

## Mechanism

We will run the current engine's logic (as defined in heartbeat.md and params.json) on 2025 non-J-anchor days (excluding the J anchor days: 4/29, 5/01, 5/04, 5/05, 5/06, 5/07) using real OPRA fill data (bid/ask, slippage model) and compute the win rate (WR%) and P&L. We require a sample of at least 20 trades.

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

This validation does not directly affect the J anchor days (OP-16) because we are using non-J-anchor days. However, it is a prerequisite for J review to ensure that the engine's simulation is accurate.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** We assume the same position sizing as in the engine's current configuration (qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline). For this validation, we will use the engine's current position sizing rules.
2. **Sample bias:** We are using 2025 non-J-anchor days only. The selection method is to take all trades triggered by the engine on non-J-anchor days in 2025. Overfit risk is low because we are not optimizing on this sample.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (this is a real-fills validation, not an OOS test for overfit)
4. **Real-fills:** We are conducting the real-fills validation as requested. We will report the result below.
5. **Failure modes:** Worst day, max drawdown, blow-up scenario will be analyzed in the validation.
6. **Concentration:** We will report the concentration (top-5 days as % of P&L) in the validation.

## Pre-merge gate

We need to collect at least 20 trades from 2025 non-J-anchor days and run the real-fills simulation.

## Confidence

We are initiating the validation. Confidence will be set after we have the results.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This analysis does not conflict with any candidate; it is a prerequisite for J review.

## Results (as of now)

We have not yet collected the 2025 non-J-anchor trades for the current engine. We need to run the engine's logic on 2025 non-J-anchor days to generate the trade signals, then validate with real OPRA fills.

We do not have the real-fills validation results for the current engine on 2025 non-J-anchor days with N≥20.

We will run the validation and update this analysis when we have the results.
